violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Per interview of staff, slicers are only washed and rinsed. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The door to the women's toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
